html:
Exclusive to:

Tab Icon.

The Rugs Tab is a crafting category exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found under the Renovate Tab. Rugs can be rotated in multiple directions.

Craftable Items and Structures

The following items and structures can be acquired in the Rugs Tab:

Name Recipe Description Spawn Code

Eye Rug		 ×2 "Stylish paranoia." rug_round

Square Throw Rug		 ×2 "Compact and fringed." rug_square

Oval Rug		 ×2 "Rose patterned." rug_oval

Large Rug		 ×3 "Large rug, rectangular." rug_rectangle

Fur Throw Rug		 ×5 "100% Beefalo hide." rug_fur

Hedgehog Rug		 ×5 "A trendy floor covering." rug_hedgehog

Porcupus Rug		 ×10 "A great status piece." rug_porcupuss

Hoofprint Rug		 ×5 "Elegance with a dash of cute." rug_hoofprint

Octagon Rug		 ×5 "Eight sides of comfort." rug_octagon

Swirl Rug		 ×5 "Hypnotic." rug_swirl

Catcoon Rug		 ×5 "Rustic." rug_catcoon

Rubbermat Rug		 ×5 "Industrial." rug_rubbermat

Web Rug		 ×5 "Sticky." rug_web

Metal Rug		 ×5 "Metallurgic sophistication." rug_metal

Wormhole Rug		 ×5 "Non-active." rug_wormhole

Braid Rug		 ×5 "Homemade." rug_braid

Beard Rug		 ×5 "Recycled from chin shavings." rug_beard

Nailbed Rug		 ×5 "Prove your will power." rug_nailbed

Crime Rug		 ×5 "Don't ask." rug_crime

Soccer Rug		 ×5 "Geometric luxury." rug_tiles
plainText:
Exclusive to:
Tab Icon.
The Rugs Tab is a crafting category exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found under the Renovate Tab. Rugs can be rotated in multiple directions.
Craftable Items and Structures[edit | edit source]
The following items and structures can be acquired in the Rugs Tab:
Name
Recipe
Description
Spawn Code
Eye Rug
×2
"Stylish paranoia."
rug_round
“I feel like someone's watching me.”

“What are you looking at?”

“ROUND GROUND ACCESSORY”

“The all seeing eye.”

“Yep. That's a rug.”

“Quit staring!”

“Ugh. So ugly.”
–Willow, when examining a Soccer Rug
“Is fancy.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Soccer Rug
“Ornamentation is pointless.”
–Wendy, when examining a Soccer Rug
“GEOMETRIC GROUND ACCESSORY”
–WX-78, when examining a Soccer Rug
“Functional.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Soccer Rug
“Not very comfy.”
–Woodie, when examining a Soccer Rug
“How geometric.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Soccer Rug
“Geometric.”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Soccer Rug
“Rug! I shall step ön thee!”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Soccer Rug
“This rug's okay.”
–Webber, when examining a Soccer Rug
“How geometric.”
–Walani, when examining a Soccer Rug
“Tasteful.”
–Warly, when examining a Soccer Rug
“'Tis a strange sail what lays on the deck.”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Soccer Rug
“'TIS RUG”
–Wilba, when examining a Soccer Rug
“Ground thing”
–Wormwood, when examining a Soccer Rug
“A pretty little rug.”
–Wheeler, when examining a Soccer Rug
summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Thẻ Thảm là một hạng mục chế tạo dành riêng cho Hamlet DLC. Nó được tìm thấy trong Tab Đổi mới. Thảm có thể xoay được nhiều hướng.
title: Rugs Tab
wikitext:
{{Exclusivity|Hamlet}} [[File:Rugs.png|thumb|104x104px|Tab Icon.]] The '''Rugs Tab''' is a crafting category exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It is found under the [[Renovate Tab]]. Rugs can be rotated in multiple directions. == Craftable Items and Structures == The following items and structures can be acquired in the Rugs Tab: {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;" |- ! scope="col" |Name ! scope="col" |Recipe ! scope="col" |Description ! scope="col" |Spawn Code |- | [[File:Eye Rug.png|32px]]
Eye Rug || [[File:Oinc.png|32px|link=Oinc]]×2 || ''"Stylish paranoia."'' || rug_round |- |colspan="4"| {{Quotes |wilson = I feel like someone's watching me. |willow = What are you looking at? |wolfgang = Is staring at Wolfgang. |wendy = Does nothing to reassure me. |wx78 = ROUND GROUND ACCESSORY |wickerbottom = The all seeing eye. |woodie = Yep. That's a rug. |maxwell = Quit staring! |wagstaff = Hypnotic. |wigfrid = Stare upon my glöry, rug! |webber = Staring contest! One, two, three - GO! |walani = Kinda gives me the willies! |warly = Gives me the creeps. |woodlegs = 'Tis a strange sail what lays on'na deck. |wilba = STAREST NAUGHT AT WILBA! |wormwood = Ground thing |wheeler = Swell. |choose = wilson |source = when examining an Eye Rug }} |- |colspan="4"|[[File:Eye Rug Build.png|128px]] |- | [[File:Square Throw Rug.png|32px]]
